description: sc-13134 cross-language golden fixtures for the Style composer (Style:/Description: directive-collision splice). Consumed by BOTH apps/web/src/styleComposer.test.js (composeStyledPrompt) AND crates/sceneworks-core/src/style_composer.rs (compose_styled_prompt) so the JS composer and its Rust port produce byte-identical `expected` output. A null `styleText` means no style was selected (identity pass-through). Add a case here to pin new behavior in both languages at once.

cases.name: no style selected -> passthrough unchanged
cases.expected: a fox in the snow

cases.name: null styleText behaves as no style -> passthrough
cases.expected: a fox in the snow

cases.name: whitespace-only styleText behaves as no style -> passthrough
cases.expected: a fox in the snow

cases.name: clean prompt -> basic Style/Description
cases.expected:
Style: cinematic watercolor
Description: a fox in the snow

cases.name: mid-sentence colon is NOT a directive
cases.userPrompt: a portrait: dramatic lighting on her face
cases.expected:
Style: oil painting
Description: a portrait: dramatic lighting on her face

cases.name: lowercase line-start colon is NOT a directive
cases.expected:
Style: oil painting
Description: style: not really a directive

cases.name: unrecognized capitalized key is NOT a directive (folds into Description)
cases.userPrompt: Note: this is a plain sentence
cases.expected:
Style: oil painting
Description: Note: this is a plain sentence

cases.name: recognized key mid-line is NOT a directive (stays prose)
cases.userPrompt: a photo with dramatic Lighting: soft
cases.expected:
Style: oil painting
Description: a photo with dramatic Lighting: soft

cases.name: recognized key after leading word is NOT a directive (stays prose)
cases.expected:
Style: oil painting
Description: The Setting: was perfect

cases.name: CRLF directive lines classify correctly, no stray carriage return
cases.expected:
Style: noir
Setting: alley
Angle: low
Description: something

cases.name: CRLF prose-then-directive splices cleanly
cases.userPrompt:
a detective
Setting: a foggy alley
cases.expected:
Style: noir
Setting: a foggy alley
Description: a detective

cases.name: foreign directive preserved as sibling, remainder -> Description
cases.userPrompt:
a detective in the rain
Setting: a foggy alley
cases.expected:
Style: noir
Setting: a foggy alley
Description: a detective in the rain

cases.name: multiple foreign directives preserved as siblings in order
cases.userPrompt:
a detective
Setting: a foggy alley
Angle: low angle
Lighting: single streetlamp
cases.expected:
Style: noir
Setting: a foggy alley
Angle: low angle
Lighting: single streetlamp
Description: a detective

cases.name: own Style line merges - catalog first, user words appended after comma
cases.userPrompt:
Style: loose brushwork
a castle on a hill
cases.expected:
Style: oil painting, loose brushwork
Description: a castle on a hill

cases.name: own Style line merges alongside other foreign directives
cases.userPrompt:
Style: high contrast
Setting: alley
a detective
cases.expected:
Style: noir, high contrast
Setting: alley
Description: a detective

cases.name: empty userPrompt with a style -> Style only, no Description
cases.expected: Style: cinematic

cases.name: whitespace-only userPrompt with a style -> Style only, no Description
cases.expected: Style: cinematic

cases.name: styleText is trimmed before templating
cases.expected:
Style: cinematic watercolor
Description: a fox

cases.name: unicode content is preserved in Description
cases.expected:
Style: 浮世絵
Description: 富士山と桜、朝の光

cases.name: unicode prose alongside a foreign directive
cases.userPrompt:
富士山と桜
Setting: 早朝
cases.expected:
Style: 浮世絵
Setting: 早朝
Description: 富士山と桜

cases.name: leading whitespace before a directive key still detects it
cases.expected:
Style: noir
Angle: low
Description: a detective

cases.name: directive-only prompt (no prose) -> Style + siblings, no Description
cases.expected:
Style: noir
Setting: alley
Angle: low

cases.name: own bare Style line (no user words) does not append a trailing comma
cases.expected:
Style: oil painting
Description: a castle

cases.name: multi-line prose remainder is preserved across lines
cases.userPrompt:
a detective
under a streetlamp
Setting: alley
cases.expected:
Style: noir
Setting: alley
Description: a detective
under a streetlamp
